flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Eastern Mennonite University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (916 → 754).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Eastern Mennonite University rose 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($21.9k → $24.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 12 pp at Eastern Mennonite University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (47.1% vs 59.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern Mennonite University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
